controls.title: Azure AI accounts must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure AI service accounts must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Configure a private endpoint and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Azure AI accounts must disable local authentication
controls.description: Azure AI clients must use Microsoft Entra identities instead of access keys.
controls.remediation: Set local_auth_enabled = false and grant Azure AI data-plane roles.

controls.title: Azure AI accounts should restrict outbound network access
controls.description: Outbound access from Azure AI services should be restricted to approved dependencies.
controls.remediation: Set outbound_network_access_restricted = true and configure approved managed network destinations.

controls.title: Machine Learning workspaces must disable public network access
controls.description: Azure Machine Learning workspaces must use private connectivity.
controls.remediation: Configure private endpoints and set public_network_access_enabled = false.

controls.title: Machine Learning workspaces must disable v1 legacy mode
controls.description: Legacy Azure Machine Learning v1 compatibility must remain disabled.
